segments.text: This is insane! There it is! We're living the Smash Bros we wanted to play!
segments.original_text: すごいぞあるぞ俺たちのやりたいスマブラを体験してる

segments.text: But the TG player says this is what modern Smash Bros is all about!
segments.original_text: しかし令和のスマブラはこれだぞと言うTGの選手

full_text: This is insane! There it is! We're living the Smash Bros we wanted to play! But the TG player says this is what modern Smash Bros is all about! Whoa!
